calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Off Calendar

Petition To Appoint A Successor Trustee And Set Non-Court Supervised Bond (Probate Code Section 17200 (10) (11)
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Require An Accounting By Trustee, And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Require An Accounting By Trustee, And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Mar-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Nancy Steidle (Guardian Ad Litem for Ashley Maseda). Avid Alavi for Elizabeth Adler (Nominated Successor Trustee). Don Ferguson appeared by telephone for Peter Gamez.

Ms. Alavi stated that she would file a bond for Ms. Adler in the amount of $416,000.00 by Wednesday. Mr. Mangini stated that he was satisfied with the accounting provided. The matter was continued to March 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the bond. If the bond is filed by noon March 11, 2011, no appearance is required. Mr. Mangini is to prepare the order removing the Public Guardian and appointing Elizabeth Adler. The accounting is off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Require An Accounting By Trustee, And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Continued To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Nancy Steidle.

Mr. Mangini stated that the Trustee provided an accounting which his Client accepted, that the Trustee signed the resignation which is effective in 30 days, that the Successor Trustee filed a declination to serve and that Elizabeth Adler has filed the consent to serve. The matter was continued to February 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Require An Accounting By Trustee, And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Continued To Jan-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Require An Accounting By Trustee, And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Continued To Jan-10-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Require An Accounting By Trustee, And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Continued To Dec-20-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Nancy Steidle (Guardian Ad Liteme for Ashley Maseda).

Mr. Mangini requested a three to four week continuance stating that the Trustee has provided him with an accouting, and that they need to address the final issue of the personal property which he expects to get resolved and have a settlement among all Parties. The matter was continued to December 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: J. Chien.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Require An Accounting By Trustee, And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Continued To Nov-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Require An Accounting By Trustee, And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Continued To Oct-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Compelling Holder Of Property To Transfer Property And For Costs And Fees
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Nancy Steidle.

Mr. Mangini stated that he had not heard from Mr. Gamez in over one year, that the relationship between his Client and Mr. Gamez changed after the Decedent's death, that Mr. Gamez threathened to get a restraining order against his Client and that he did not get a response to any of his correspondence or any phone calls. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Order Compelling Holder Of Property To Transfer Property And For Costs And Fees
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Continued To Jun-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
